// PROXY GROUPS: Each group connects through a different IP, so they each get their own rate-limit burst.
// HOW TO USE: Add your SOCKS5 proxy addresses below. Each group launches its bots in parallel with other groups.
// NO PROXIES?: Set totalBots to how many you want and leave groups empty - they'll all go direct (slow: ~11s each after first 4).
// SETUP: Use start-everything.bat (Windows) or start-everything.sh (Mac/Linux). It opens the SSH tunnels AND launches bots.
// RECONNECT: Bots auto-reconnect when kicked or disconnected. Set to false to disable.
// RATE LIMIT: CyTube allows ~5 connections burst per IP, then 1 every ~10s.
// TUNNEL HEALTH: Checks if SOCKS tunnels are alive. If dead for 2 checks in a row, restarts SSH.
// TUNNEL RESTART: Fill in your VPS details here so the bot can auto-restart dead tunnels.
// TUNNEL RESTART NOTE: Remove tunnelRestart array entirely to disable auto-restart (monitor-only mode).
// LOGGING: Set to 'minimal' to reduce noise, 'verbose' for full chat logs, 'silent' for errors only.
